citation.description: py/file-not-closed fix: 'with open(_applied_path(...)' pattern; _read_hinted also uses 'with open' at line 217. export_ndjson.py uses try/finally with noqa:SIM115 for the long-lived handle. audit/page.py and janitor.py have no remaining lambdas. opcert.py and structured.py have no function-local re-imports. insertionProvider.js has no unused const. SIM115 added to ruff select at pyproject.toml:293.

criteria.criterion: All 31 fixes applied; each is a mechanical transform with no behavior change.

citation.description: SIM115 is now in ruff select; open() calls that legitimately cannot use 'with' carry '# noqa: SIM115' inline comments (e.g. export_ndjson.py:151). All other affected open() calls now use 'with'. Ticket comment attests local ruff check src tests passes green.

Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart (Gerrit 809 push comment) attests '286 tests pass' locally with ruff check src tests + mypy clean. Test files (test_editor.py, test_validation_depth.py, test_conflict_filing_deferred.py, etc.) confirmed to exist without redundant local imports or chained 'and' assertions in current form.

criteria.criterion: Affected test modules pass (targeted pytest run) + no import/collection errors.
